apps.name: Trellis
apps.subtitle: Personal tasks, habits & planning.
apps.localizedDescription: Trellis is a personal task, habit and planning app: a compressed-time Today timeline with tasks, habits, calendar events and travel legs.

versions.localizedDescription: Habit Streak widget (GitHub-style contribution graph per habit). Also: project renamed to Trellis.
Calendar events, travel legs, drag-to-reschedule, and the overdue group.
